claim_ceiling.allowed_summary: Nomic availability, documents_v2 repair-case retrieval improvement, denominator measurement infrastructure, and public source-of-truth receipts may be described with their limits.
claim_ceiling.denied_summary: Token Capital existence proof, token appreciation, compounding value, publication-grade answer faithfulness, and downstream contribution claims remain unsupported.

answer_faithfulness.public_ceiling: Answer-level evaluation is instrumented, but current generated answers are not publication-grade and do not support answer-faithfulness claims.

compounding_value.public_ceiling: Denied. Retrieval and answer-context exposure do not prove compounding value.

corpus_utilization_denominator.public_ceiling: The generated/persisted corpus denominator is explicit; indexing, retrieval, answer context, and downstream contribution remain separate numerators.

documents_v2_repair.public_ceiling: documents_v2 is a non-destructive approved-corpus repair case with explicit parser coverage accounting.

downstream_contribution.public_ceiling: Downstream contribution has not been measured; no value or economic contribution claim is supported.

nomic_embedding_availability.public_ceiling: Nomic embedding availability is repaired: the configured stable alias is available and dimensionality validation passes.

public_source_of_truth.public_ceiling: Live public weblog/OMG entries have source-of-truth disposition rows; this is a source receipt, not a Token Capital claim upgrade.

retrieval_improvement.public_ceiling: Full documents_v2 materially improves golden-query retrieval over legacy documents, while remaining weaker than the focused seed.

token_appreciation.public_ceiling: Denied. There is no measurement showing generated tokens appreciate as assets.

token_capital_existence_proof.public_ceiling: Denied. The current evidence supports only a hypothesis and repair-case narrative, not an existence proof.

evidence_artifacts.title: RAG documents_v2 full backfill and parser coverage
RAG answer faithfulness and downstream contribution evaluation

forbidden_public_claims.reason: Current post-RAG evidence denies existence-proof language.
No appreciation metric or asset-value run exists.
Generated answers are currently weak on the answer suite.
No downstream contribution ledger has been consumed.

required_next_evidence: materially improved generated-answer support and faithfulness
future public claim gate receipt that explicitly permits stronger language
